contact.title: Contact Information
contact.createAccountLabel: Create an account to track orders and save your details for faster checkout
contact.guestHint: 💡 After ordering as a guest, use your phone number and order ID to track your order status.

payment.title: Payment Method

paypal.label: PayPal
paypal.description: Pay securely with your PayPal account

payment.paypalHint: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your payment securely.
payment.securityNote: Your payment information is encrypted and secure. We never store card details.

confirmation.heading: Thank You, {{firstName}}!
confirmation.description: Your order has been received and our artisans will begin crafting your nails shortly. A confirmation has been sent to {{email}}.
confirmation.orderIdHint: Save this to track your order
confirmation.trackHint: 📱 You can track your order status using your phone number ({{phone}}) and order ID above.
